title: Pinned board blurb
excerpt: We need a way to pin a comment to the top of any board! We want to have a kind of wiki with general important information about each of my projects, and each project is tracked as a board. The board updates would be fine…

posts.author: sfs1 (Steven)
posts.cookedHtml: We need a way to pin a comment to the top of any board! We want to have a kind of wiki with general important information about each of my projects, and each project is tracked as a board. The board updates would be fine if I could pin something so that its always visible at the top.
